但就这本儿写的符合我的胃口。虽说院里的繁杂琐事儿没有太多描写，但对其他地方写的特别精彩，情节合理人物分寸拿捏到位。","text_exts":[{"e":20,"s":15,"text":"情满四合院","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%83%85%E6%BB%A1%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774269108CD0F511E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227130541363652756254%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227113011155601198114%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%83%85%E6%BB%A1%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1660208615,"group_id":"7113011155601198114","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"随风飘摇","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6FclM6oyyiJV8phKXbazUM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/00d05907c7fa479eba9a7245d44077b6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789954&x-signature=DWX1l9QzM%2FV4%2B1ozILlW0uXAzf0%3D","user_id":"78187455967","user_name":"蒸饺"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"78187455967","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1773604279,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7113011155601198114","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越四合院，回到六十年代。
面对满院子的蝇营狗苟，夏辰只想过好自己的小日子。
这里无戾气，有的只是温馨。前期少量四合院，后期立足香江，遍布全球。
建立最庞大的家族，成为最富有的幕后大BOSS。
古董，工业，农场，影视娱乐，科技网络，通讯手机，枪炮飞机……
全方位发展，一个都不少。

可成长型的农场，田地，菜园，果园，牧场物语鱼塘，百草园，小海洋……
种植养殖，还有各种宠物……
改变世界，从四合院开始……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/53b15115cce871e3b1960a550cfe08eb","author":"青冥剑仙","author_id":"","book_id":"7113011155601198114","book_name":"四合院：从四九城到港综","book_short_name":"四合院到港综","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7113194263420240396","read_count":"26098","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1571978"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"680","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,多女主,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9fd4a9a46594d31463841cea2f04293e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779453108&x-signature=YzigWJLPoHdw6yDa%2BaCvR1mQnvQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3342936260226096","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.274988e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232031480EB062AA060FCD0F511E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":21,"forwarded_cou
